mapper.select: SELECT id, cart_id, product_id, quantity, unit_price_cents, created_at FROM cart_items WHERE cart_id = #{cartId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items (cart_id, product_id, quantity, unit_price_cents) VALUES (#{cartId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPriceCents})
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_items SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
